creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Kevin, you can obsolete an attachment at any time:

Attachment -> Details -> Edit Details -> [X] Obsolete

Also, for all of your existing issues (bugs) including this one, and future issues, can you please:

* Use Summary: "category/port: Update to <version>"
* Set maintainer-approval on the patch you approve (you're already doing this)
* Obsolete any other incorrect/old attachments (remove maintainer-approval -)
* Remove maintainer-feedback + (its only needed in response to a ? request)

This will save our triage team a heap of manual effort :)
